topics.title: The Mystery of the Jackie Puppet
topics.summary: The studio explores a long-running controversy regarding the disappearance of a puppet and features a recount of how the prop was originally introduced to the show.

topics.title: Missing Puppets and Media Mergers
topics.summary: The studio discusses a missing puppet, upcoming wrestling segments featuring the Iron Sheik, the passing of Tom Snyder, and the implications of Rupert Murdoch's media acquisitions.

topics.title: Media Consolidation and Broadcasting Philosophy
topics.summary: The studio explores the implications of satellite radio mergers, the evolution of media ownership rules, and a retrospective look at a 1991 interview between Howard Stern and Tom Snyder regarding their differing philosophies on shock radio versus traditional broadcasting.

topics.title: Danny Bonaducci Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Danny Bonaducci regarding his divorce, his new television project, and his rising radio ratings.

topics.title: Danny's Relationship and Career Growth
topics.summary: The studio discusses Danny's new relationship, his recent rise in radio ratings, and reflects on the history of the Channel 9 show.

topics.title: Staff Contributions and Production Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the specific roles of various contributors, the absence of producer Gary, and the upcoming release of a multi-part radio biography.

topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Personal Life Updates
topics.summary: The studio explores internal show dynamics, personal relationships, and upcoming guests while discussing a guest's weight goals and the possibility of future children.

topics.title: Ralph Zarella's Career and Collaboration History
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional history between Howard Stern and Ralph Zarella, detailing Zarella's work in special effects, his role as a stylist, and their long-standing collaborative relationship.

topics.title: Age of Love Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with professional tennis player Mark Philip Pousis regarding his experiences and interactions with women on the reality dating show Age of Love.

topics.title: Mark Philippoussis Tennis Career and Reality Show
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with tennis player Mark Philippousis regarding his appearance on the reality show Age of Love, his career in professional tennis, and various personal questions from callers.

topics.title: Reality Television and Medical Exams
topics.summary: The studio discusses the motivations of a reality TV personality, Howard TV ratings, local news updates regarding an eviction, and the personal discomfort associated with routine medical examinations.

topics.title: Medical Exams and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding the discomfort of medical examinations, celebrity wedding sponsorships, home renovation plans for a game room, and various pop culture references including Star Wars costumes and vintage wrestling clips.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers O.J. Simpson's comments regarding his book rights, the legal troubles of reality star Matthew Roloff, Nicole Richie's pregnancy and drug use, Britney Spears' erratic behavior, and Keith Richards' upcoming autobiography.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including celebrity news, sports updates, the Iraq War, media ownership by Rupert Murdoch, Robin Roberts' health announcement, and upcoming comedy tours.
